charter: Design of per-session watermarks and ingest-time auto-refresh for mindframe-z threads. Capture the decision rationale (deterministic TS-computed watermark vs agent-reported; full re-synthesis as default vs delta as opt-in escape hatch; auto-refresh folded into ingest to pay the digest once; config as a sibling of thread defaults), the empirical gather-cost and session-size measurements that drove those calls (e.g. largest claude session $0.10, largest opencode session ~1.44M tokens for $0.24), and the resulting OpenSpec change add-thread-session-watermarks.

sessions.title: Per-Session Watermarks and Ingest-Time Auto-Refresh Design
